title: Fix line break in Ubuntu installation instructions

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`

:pushpin: Commit 14fe724 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 14fe724b39c00a246e19ddda5a249e4924104c4a -->

:sunny: Test successful - [status-papr](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/buildah/be9d265002608c76029250b01a0553397f5aef08.1517956616910493696/index.html)
Approved by: rhatdan
Pushing be9d265002608c76029250b01a0553397f5aef08 to master...
:eyes: Test was successful, but fast-forwarding failed: 422 Update is not a fast forward

@robertlemke You need to sign your PR.
git commit -a --amend -s
git push --force

Should fix this.
@robertlemke Are you still interested in fixing this?
I don't think this is a bug.
